name: twilio-sms
description: Send and receive SMS via the Twilio REST API and webhooks. Adds a 'twilio-sms' channel adapter (outbound via Twilio Messages API, inbound via signed Twilio webhooks).
author: KinBot

fields.name: accountSid
fields.label: Account SID
fields.description: Your Twilio Account SID (starts with AC, visible on the Twilio Console dashboard).

fields.name: authToken
fields.label: Auth Token
fields.description: Your Twilio Auth Token. Used both for the REST API and to verify inbound webhook signatures.

fields.name: fromNumber
fields.label: From Number
fields.description: The Twilio phone number that sends SMS. Must be E.164 format with a leading +.
